_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine

_contextSnippet: CQ and HCQ significantly increased the mRNA (Fig. 3b) and protein (Fig. 3c and Supplementary Fig. S4) levels of MMP1...The MMP1 proteins upregulated by CQ and HCQ were actually released in the culture supernatants
details: HCQ treatment at 50 μM significantly increased MMP1 mRNA and protein levels in NFFs, with restored MMP1 release in culture supernatants
